panels.title: Rolling 30-Day Sharpe Ratio
panels.description: Annualised Sharpe over a 30-day rolling window of daily portfolio returns. Gate: > 1.0.

targets.rawSql: WITH port AS (SELECT trading_date, COALESCE(ending_value, starting_value) AS v FROM daily_pnl ORDER BY trading_date), rets AS (SELECT trading_date, (v - LAG(v) OVER (ORDER BY trading_date)) / NULLIF(LAG(v) OVER (ORDER BY trading_date), 0) AS r FROM port) SELECT trading_date AS time, ROUND((SQRT(252) * AVG(r) OVER (ORDER BY trading_date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) / NULLIF(STDDEV(r) OVER (ORDER BY trading_date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 0))::numeric, 2)::float8 AS "Sharpe (30d)" FROM rets WHERE r IS NOT NULL ORDER BY trading_date

panels.title: P&L by Symbol — Top 10 (THB)
panels.description: Cumulative realized P&L per symbol, converted to THB. Green = profitable, red = losing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT symbol AS "Symbol", ROUND((realized_pnl * 35.7)::numeric, 0)::float8 AS "P&L (THB)" FROM positions WHERE realized_pnl <> 0 ORDER BY realized_pnl DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Signal Score Distribution
panels.description: Histogram of BUY/SELL signal scores (0.55–1.0). Shows how often high-confidence signals fire.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN score >= 0.95 THEN '0.95-1.00' WHEN score >= 0.90 THEN '0.90-0.95' WHEN score >= 0.85 THEN '0.85-0.90' WHEN score >= 0.80 THEN '0.80-0.85' WHEN score >= 0.75 THEN '0.75-0.80' WHEN score >= 0.70 THEN '0.70-0.75' WHEN score >= 0.65 THEN '0.65-0.70' WHEN score >= 0.60 THEN '0.60-0.65' WHEN score >= 0.55 THEN '0.55-0.60' ELSE '<0.55' END AS "Score Bucket", COUNT(*)::int AS "Count" FROM signals WHERE direction IN ('BUY','SELL') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: RSI at Entry — Signal Distribution
panels.description: RSI value when signal was generated (from signals.features->>'rsi'). Confirms mean-reversion filter is working: BUY signals should cluster below 30, SELL above 70.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN (features->>'rsi')::float < 20 THEN '0–20 Oversold' WHEN (features->>'rsi')::float < 30 THEN '20–30 Oversold' WHEN (features->>'rsi')::float < 40 THEN '30–40' WHEN (features->>'rsi')::float < 50 THEN '40–50 Neutral' WHEN (features->>'rsi')::float < 60 THEN '50–60 Neutral' WHEN (features->>'rsi')::float < 70 THEN '60–70' WHEN (features->>'rsi')::float < 80 THEN '70–80 Overbought' ELSE '80–100 Overbought' END AS "RSI Bucket", COUNT(*)::int AS "Signals", ROUND(AVG(score)::numeric, 3)::float8 AS "Avg Score" FROM signals WHERE direction IN ('BUY','SELL') AND features->>'rsi' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN((features->>'rsi')::float)

panels.title: Trade Duration Distribution
panels.description: Time from BUY fill to matching SELL fill for the same symbol. Shows average holding period.

targets.rawSql: WITH buys AS (SELECT symbol, timestamp AS buy_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY timestamp) AS rn FROM fills WHERE side='BUY'), sells AS (SELECT symbol, timestamp AS sell_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY timestamp) AS rn FROM fills WHERE side='SELL'), pairs AS (SELECT b.symbol, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (s.sell_time - b.buy_time)) / 86400.0 AS duration_days FROM buys b JOIN sells s ON b.symbol=s.symbol AND b.rn=s.rn WHERE s.sell_time > b.buy_time) SELECT CASE WHEN duration_days < 1 THEN '< 1 day' WHEN duration_days < 3 THEN '1–3 days' WHEN duration_days < 7 THEN '3–7 days' WHEN duration_days < 14 THEN '7–14 days' WHEN duration_days < 30 THEN '14–30 days' ELSE '> 30 days' END AS "Duration", COUNT(*)::int AS "Trades" FROM pairs GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(duration_days)

panels.title: Win Rate by Symbol
panels.description: Profitable round-trips ÷ total round-trips per symbol. Identifies which symbols the strategy trades well.

targets.rawSql: WITH buys AS (SELECT symbol, fill_price AS buy_price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY timestamp) AS rn FROM fills WHERE side='BUY'), sells AS (SELECT symbol, fill_price AS sell_price, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY timestamp) AS rn FROM fills WHERE side='SELL'), pairs AS (SELECT b.symbol, CASE WHEN s.sell_price > b.buy_price THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS win FROM buys b JOIN sells s ON b.symbol=s.symbol AND b.rn=s.rn) SELECT symbol AS "Symbol", ROUND(100.0 * SUM(win) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1)::float8 AS "Win Rate %" FROM pairs GROUP BY symbol HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Signal Score over Time
panels.description: Rolling average signal score (BUY/SELL) by day. Declining scores may indicate degrading market conditions.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, ROUND(AVG(score)::numeric, 3)::float8 AS "Avg Score", ROUND(MAX(score)::numeric, 3)::float8 AS "Max Score", ROUND(MIN(score)::numeric, 3)::float8 AS "Min Score" FROM signals WHERE direction IN ('BUY','SELL') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Signal Act Rate
panels.description: % of BUY/SELL signals that led to an order (acted_on=true). Low rate indicates risk engine is rejecting many signals.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE acted_on) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1), 0)::float8 AS "Act Rate %" FROM signals WHERE direction IN ('BUY','SELL')

panels.title: Top Reject Reasons
panels.description: Risk engine rejection reasons from signals.reject_reason. Identifies which risk rules fire most often.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(reject_reason, 'N/A') AS "Reason", COUNT(*)::int AS "Count" FROM signals WHERE direction IN ('BUY','SELL') AND acted_on = false GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10
